name: Haggling
description: Reduces purchase prices and increases sale prices at markets

perks.name: Sharp Eye
perks.description: See market price trends for all commodities

perks.name: Master Trader
perks.description: 10% better prices at all markets (buy lower, sell higher)

perks.name: Trade Prince
perks.description: Access to exclusive high-value trade contracts

name: Market Analysis
description: Better market data, predict price changes, identify profitable routes

perks.name: Price History
perks.description: View 7-day price history for all commodities

perks.name: Route Optimizer
perks.description: Auto-calculate most profitable trade routes between systems

name: Cargo Management
description: Increased cargo capacity, better organization, reduced mass penalty

perks.name: Efficient Packing
perks.description: +10% cargo capacity on all ships

perks.name: Mass Optimization
perks.description: Cargo mass reduced by 20%, improving jump range and fuel efficiency

name: Gunnery
description: Increased weapon damage, accuracy, and projectile speed

perks.name: Precision Targeting
perks.description: +15% weapon accuracy and projectile speed

perks.name: Overcharge
perks.description: Weapons deal 25% more damage but overheat 50% faster

perks.name: Devastating Salvo
perks.description: Every 5th shot deals double damage

name: Shield Systems
description: Stronger shields, faster recharge, better resistance

perks.name: Fast Recharge
perks.description: Shield recharge rate increased by 50%

perks.name: Harmonics
perks.description: Shields resist energy damage 30% better

perks.name: Reflective Plating
perks.description: 10% chance to reflect projectile damage back to attacker

name: Missile Systems
description: Better missile tracking, damage, capacity, and countermeasures

perks.name: Target Lock
perks.description: Missile lock-on time reduced by 30%

perks.name: Warhead Specialist
perks.description: Missiles deal +30% damage

perks.name: Swarm Launch
perks.description: Fire 2 missiles per launch (consumes 2 ammo)

name: Navigation
description: Increased jump range, reduced fuel consumption, better route planning

perks.name: Fuel Efficiency
perks.description: Jump fuel cost reduced by 15%

perks.name: Warp Drive Tuning
perks.description: Jump range increased by 20%

perks.name: Quantum Slipstream
perks.description: 10% chance to jump for free (no fuel consumed)

name: Evasive Maneuvers
description: Better turning, speed boost, damage avoidance

perks.name: Afterburner Mastery
perks.description: Afterburner duration +50%, cooldown -20%

perks.name: Jinking
perks.description: 15% chance to evade incoming fire completely

perks.name: Phase Shift
perks.description: Brief invulnerability (3 seconds) when hull drops below 25% (once per combat)

name: Ship Repair
description: Faster repairs, cheaper maintenance, emergency repairs in combat

perks.name: Field Repairs
perks.description: Repair hull during combat (slow, 1% hull per second)

perks.name: Jury Rigging
perks.description: Temporary repair boosts damaged system performance by 20% for 30 seconds

name: Systems Engineering
description: Upgrade efficiency, reduced power draw, overclock systems

perks.name: Power Management
perks.description: All ship systems consume 10% less power

perks.name: Overclocking
perks.description: Overclock one system for 50% performance (10% chance of temporary failure)

name: Surveying
description: Better scanner range, more detailed scans, discover hidden resources

perks.name: Deep Scan
perks.description: Scanner range doubled, reveals hidden asteroid fields

perks.name: Resource Detection
perks.description: See mineral content and richness of asteroids/planets before mining

name: Xenoarchaeology
description: Find and analyze ancient artifacts, tech fragments, and ruins

perks.name: Artifact Hunter
perks.description: Ancient artifacts found 3x more often during exploration

perks.name: Tech Decoder
perks.description: Decode alien tech fragments into usable blueprints

name: Command
description: Crew efficiency, mission rewards, faction influence

perks.name: Inspiring Presence
perks.description: Crew work 15% faster (repairs, loading, system cooldowns)

perks.name: Diplomat
perks.description: Faction reputation gains increased by 25%

perks.name: Fleet Commander
perks.description: Can hire and command escort ships (up to 2)

name: Persuasion
description: Better mission rewards, lower bribe costs, unique dialogue options

perks.name: Silver Tongue
perks.description: Mission rewards increased by 20%

perks.name: Connections
perks.description: Access to restricted faction missions and unique dialogue options
